title: My Service Canada Account (MSCA) - Canada.ca
content:
## My Service Canada Account (MSCA)
Sign in to your account to access and manage a wide range of government services and benefits.
- Disruption of Canada Post services - strike paused Canada Post operations have resumed. Tentative agreements have been reached, and Canada Post and its union have agreed not to engage in any strike or lockout activity until the ratification process is complete. Consult the measures in place during a disruption of Canada Post services .

## Disruption of Canada Post services - strike paused
Canada Post operations have resumed. Tentative agreements have been reached, and Canada Post and its union have agreed not to engage in any strike or lockout activity until the ratification process is complete. Consult the measures in place during a disruption of Canada Post services .
- Be cautious of suspicious messages We will never ask for your password or personal information via emails, text messages or links. Don't click on suspicious links or open attachments from unknown senders. If you receive message that you believe is a scam, please delete it.

## Be cautious of suspicious messages
We will never ask for your password or personal information via emails, text messages or links. Don't click on suspicious links or open attachments from unknown senders.
If you receive message that you believe is a scam, please delete it.
To access your personal income tax slips (such as T3, T4, T4RIF, T4RSP, T5, T5007 and T5008), visit CRA My account for Individuals .
The option to change your personal information is currently unavailable for some MSCA services. Visit Change your personal information to learn more about your options.

## MSCA secure account access
- Interac ® Sign-In Partner bank Sign-In
- GCKey username and password GCKey Sign-In
- Provincial sign-in (BC and AB only) Province Sign-In
You registered with either GCKey, Interac® Sign-In Partner or provincial sign-in  when you created your account.
Use the option you registered with every time you sign in. It’s tied to your account and user profile.
If you want to choose another sign in option, you’ll have to register for it.
Get more help with your account .

## Help with your account

### Interac® Sign-In Partner (bank)
Interac® Sign-In Partner allows you to register or sign in using your online sign in banking information to access MSCA.
If you moved to a new financial institution, you may be able to switch your Sign-In Partner by following these steps:
- select Interac® Sign-In Partner
- select Switch My Sign-In Partner from the top menu on the Select a Sign-In Partner page
- follow the steps to change your Sign-In Partner
To learn more, visit Interac® sign-in for government services .

### Interac® verification service
Interac® verification service allows you to verify your identity during your MSCA registration. You will only have to complete this step once.
To learn more, visit our Interac® verification service page.
GCKey allows you to access multiple Government of Canada online services. Visit GCKey help page to learn more about:
- how to create a GCKey username and password
- how to sign in using GCKey
- what to do if you forgot your username and password
- how to change your password and recovery questions
- what to do if your GCKey has been revoked
If you wish to speak to a GCKey representative, visit GCKey Contact us .
PACs are used to verify your identity when registering for MSCA. If you already applied for CPP/OAS benefits, your PAC has been sent to you by mail.
To learn more or to request a PAC, visit the page Verify your identity with a PAC .
If you notice any suspicious activity on your account, reset your password immediately. To learn how to reset your password and for more information, visit Account protection .

### Protect your personal information
- Be aware of your surroundings when you enter passwords and security codes in public
- Don't share your passwords or security codes
- Sign out of MSCA when you are done, then close your browser

### Avoid technical problems
- Don't bookmark secure MSCA pages (which means the pages you see after you sign in)
- Use one of the following Web browsers: Google Chrome Safari Microsoft Edge Mozilla Firefox
- For Apple users, use one of the following operating system: iOS (version 13 or newer) MacOS (version 10.15 or newer)
- iOS (version 13 or newer)
- MacOS (version 10.15 or newer)
- Enable cookies and JavaScript in your browser
Multi-factor authentication is a mandatory enhanced security measure. It has been implemented in MSCA to protect your personal information.
To learn more, visit the page Multi-factor authentication to access MSCA .
- Canadian Dental Care Plan – Contact us
- Employment Insurance Contact information - Individuals
- Contact the Canada Pension Plan
- Contact Old Age Security
- Canada Disability Benefit – Contact us
- Contact the Social Insurance Number – Contact us
- National Student Loans Service Centre program
- Canada Apprentice Loan – Contact us
For all other inquiries, contact 1 800 O-Canada .

## Services available once you sign in to MSCA
- Canadian Dental Care Plan
- Employment Insurance
- Canada Disability Benefit
- Social Insurance Number
- National Student Loans Service Centre
- Canada Apprentice Loan online service account

## Find another government account

### All Government of Canada online accounts
There are many accounts across the Government of Canada for different services. Find the service you need.

### Give feedback about this page
Thank you for your feedback.
